description_long: This is a dark glass wine bottle with a classic Bordeaux shape, featuring a tall, cylindrical body and a gently sloping shoulder. The front label is rectangular, predominantly black with gold and yellow floral or abstract artwork, and some fine text details. The neck of the bottle is long and straight, topped with a black capsule that covers the closure and displays gold branding. The back label is larger, with detailed product information, branding, and a barcode, all in white or gold text on a black background. The bottle's surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light, and the glass appears thick and sturdy. The overall appearance is elegant and premium, suitable for display or gifting in urban environments.
description: A dark glass wine bottle with gold-accented labels and a glossy black capsule, exuding a premium and elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with gold and yellow artwork and branding details.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the edge of the front label and part of the back label, with the capsule and neck visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the detailed product information label, branding, and barcode.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the side of both the front and back labels, with the neck and capsule in focus.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label: rectangular, black with gold/yellow artwork and fine text; Back label: large, black with white/gold text, branding, and barcode; Capsule: black with gold branding text around the neck.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, straight, narrow neck with a slight taper and a flared lip at the top.
